meta.paper_title: AgAu bimetallic NPs synthesized with starch - antimicrobial (2019)

extraction.page_description: First page of the paper containing the title, author list, affiliations, abstract, keywords, and beginning of the Introduction section. The abstract contains quantitative data about nanoparticle sizes and general results descriptions.

text_data_mentioned.condition: AuNPs, mean particle size from TEM/XRD
Ag/AuNPs (bimetallic), mean particle size from TEM/XRD

extraction.page_description: Introduction section of the paper discussing antimicrobial resistance, nanotechnology in medicine, green nanotechnology synthesis methods, and starch-based nanoparticle synthesis. No figures, tables, or quantitative experimental data are present on this page.

Materials and methods section including chemicals, synthesis of colloidal noble metal NPs, and characterization techniques. Contains Table 1 with experimental parameters for AuNPs and Ag/AuNPs synthesis.

tables_found.table_description: Experimental parameters used in the synthesis of colloidal AuNPs and Ag/AuNPs

extraction.page_description: Methods section describing DLS/zeta-potential measurements, ICP-MS analysis, STEM/HRTEM/EDS imaging, SEM sample preparation, bacterial culture protocols, antibacterial assay methods (growth curves and Gompertz model fitting), and colony-counting unit assays. Contains equations (1) and (2) for the modified Gompertz model.

extraction.page_description: Figure 9 showing colony-counting assay results for MDR E. coli and MRSA treated with monometallic AuNPs (panels A, B) and bimetallic Ag/AuNPs (panels C, D) at various nanoparticle concentrations (0-20 μg/mL) after 8 hours of treatment.

extraction.page_description: Page contains 4 bar charts showing MTS cytotoxicity assays. Figure 11 shows HDF cells treated with AuNPs (A) and Ag/AuNPs (B). Figure 12 shows MEL (melanoma) cells treated with AuNPs (A) and Ag/AuNPs (B). Concentrations range from 0-20 μg/mL at 24 and 72 hours.

text_data_mentioned.condition: AuNPs 1-20 μg/mL, HDF cells, no significant cytotoxicity found
Ag/AuNPs showed higher cytotoxic effect in HDF compared to AuNPs, especially at 72h (day 3)
